steps.title: Read Cole's attitude
steps.content: The sentence calls photography and writing Cole's passions and says they culminate in a book that evocatively combines his photographs and prose. The blank must describe a positive, invested attitude toward both interests.

steps.title: Match the attitude word
steps.content:
• Choice A: Means lack of interest, the opposite of passions.
  • Choice B: Means eager interest, matching Cole's investment in photography and writing.
  • Choice C: Means worry, which the passage does not suggest.
  • Choice D: Means unexpected reaction, not sustained interest.
The answer is B.
